claims.summary: A 12D glimpse must not replace the 32D transport/fingerprint identity.
claims.disposition: Verified additive schema, separate validated view, and coexistence tests.

claims.summary: Pulling a 12D glimpse for readout must not mutate shadow or semantic state.
claims.disposition: Verified the field is read-only telemetry and the codec readout has no live vector write.

claims.summary: 32D-to-12D fidelity and Shadow-v3 dispersal should be compared on exact captures.
claims.disposition: Routed as bounded offline comparison with the 32D source retained.

claims.summary: A contextual glimpse toggle that affects live state, transport, or regulation changes the sensory contract.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait.
